subcodes.first_line: The primary purpose of creation hath ever been the knowledge of God, and all people, both young and old, await these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود اصلی از آفرینش عرفان الله بوده و جمیع ناس از صغیر و کبیر منتظر ایام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun, @knowledge; recognition of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
